= Like a Boss =
Like a Boss was a clan created by [[User Asrack|Asrack]] and [[User Purplehaze|Purplehaze]] in the middle of May. (May 16, 2009). It was a forge of all our favorite friends in LX and has such grown to be more then that. :D

== Members ==
* [[User Asrack|Asrack]]
* Gigolo
* [[Snap]]
* Leon
* Pure
* [[User Vidar|Vidar]]
* [[Aegir|Krystal]]
* Tyrael
* [[Azriath]]
* [[Cloud]]
* [[User Purplehaze|Purplehaze]]
* SoUa

== Clan Wars ==
* ''Total Wins'': 15
* ''Total Loses'': 4
* ''Total Draws'': 0
* ''Total Clan Wars'': 19
* -LaB- vs [AoG] 1:2
* -LaB- vs (BANG) 1:2
* -LaB- vs [dp] 2:0
* -LaB- vs |LaG| 1:2
* -LaB- vs [Fx] 2:0
* -LaB- vs [Fx] 2:0
* -LaB- vs [Fx] 1:2
* -LaB- vs [Sn] 2:0
* -LaB- vs [Sn] 2:0
* -LaB- vs (Ew) 2:0
* -LaB- vs [Sn] 2:0
* -LaB- vs [Sn] 2:0
* -LaB- vs [Sn] 2:0
* -LaB- vs {BANG} 1:0
* -LaB- vs [doT] 2:0
* -LaB- vs [e4] 2:0
* -LaB- vs |LaG| 2:1
* -LaB- vs [T3] 2:0

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721204500/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Like_a_Boss -->
